content: CRITICAL PATTERN: write EAGAIN = pipe buffer overflow. Prevention: Main session uses ONLY zero-pipe tools (view, edit, grep, glob, sql, create). ALL execution delegated to task agents with isolated pipes. Max 2 async shells + 2 background agents. 2-second cooldown between spawns. Never spawn shell + agent same turn. Output cap 100 lines. Large output → redirect to file → view tool.
